headline: Cat Learns To Open Fridge, Now Demands Tuna On Demand, Refuses To Work For It
summary: The cat has unionized and is demanding 'treats now, work never.' Negotiations are ongoing.
fullBody: Mr. Whiskers, a domestic shorthair from Spokane, has learned to open the refrigerator using his paws. He now helps himself to tuna, cheese, and occasionally leftover chicken. His owner, Mark, attempted to negotiate a 'treats for tricks' arrangement. Mr. Whiskers walked away mid-sentence. 'He's not even pretending to negotiate,' Mark said. The cat has been spotted teaching other neighborhood cats the technique. The fridge is now baby-proofed. Mr. Whiskers is studying the lock.
